message:
fix(fnx-conformance): migrate HarnessConfig to CompatibilityMode enum and add fixtures

- Replace bool strict_mode with CompatibilityMode enum to match struct
  definition change from prior commit
- Add 6 readwrite conformance fixtures covering edge cases:
  - gml_empty_graph_strict: Empty GML graph parsing
  - gml_self_loop_strict: GML with self-loops
  - json_graph_empty_strict: Empty JSON graph
  - json_graph_weighted_strict: JSON graph with edge weights
  - edgelist_weighted_strict: Edgelist with weights
  - graphml_with_node_attrs_strict: GraphML with node attributes
- Add 3 structured log gate fixtures for validation tests:
  - structured_log_bundle_id_mismatch
  - structured_log_missing_bundle_index
  - structured_log_missing_env_key_packet003
- Simplify run_fixture() default mode handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
